meaning.detailed: The Fool represents a fresh start, a leap of faith. You are on the verge of an adventure, but must remain open-minded and trust the journey.
You have all the tools you need to succeed. Focus your will and take action – the universe is supporting your endeavors.
Trust your inner voice. Secrets may be revealed; pay attention to your dreams and gut feelings.
Nurture yourself and others. Creativity and growth are flourishing – embrace them.
Establish order and take charge. You have the power to create stability through discipline.
Seek guidance from established institutions or mentors. Sometimes following tradition brings peace.
A significant relationship or decision is at hand. Follow your heart but weigh the consequences.
Stay focused and drive forward. You will overcome obstacles through sheer determination.
True strength comes from inner calm. Face challenges with grace and compassion.
Take time to reflect. The answers you seek lie within – or from a wise teacher.
